subject: ATA 57 – Wing – Main Landing Gear Retraction Actuator Fitting – Inspection

applicability_rules.msn_constraints: Group 1: A321 aeroplanes (excluding Group 2). Group 2: A321 aeroplanes with MSN 364 or MSN 385. Group 3: A320 aeroplanes where SB A320-57-1089 has not been embodied before the effective date. Group 4: A320 aeroplanes that are not Group 3.

excluded_if_modifications.description: Airbus Service Bulletin (SB) A320-57-1089 at Revision 04 embodied in service

applicability_rules.notes: The AD defines applicability through four groups: Group 1 (A321s, excluding Group 2), Group 2 (A321s with MSN 364 or 385), Group 3 (A320s without SB A320-57-1089), and Group 4 (A320s not in Group 3).
